privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. The task creates synthetic test data: a 400x300px multi-layer GIMP image (XCF format) with 3 layers (Background: blue gradient, Circle: red circle, Text: yellow text) generated using ImageMagick and GIMP batch scripts. The task verifies that merging the top 'Text' layer down to the 'Circle' layer reduces the layer count by exactly 1 (from 3 to 2) while preserving visual appearance (SSIM ≥ 0.98).
